Document:
# Station Alert - Epsilon
[italic]Called by: Central Command Only.[/italic]
[color=#b000ff]Emergency alert status. Central Command has ordered the Epsilon security level on the station. Only orders from Central Command Officials are to be obeyed by the Station's Crew. Martial Law is in effect.[/color] - [color=#a4885c]COC[/color]: Central Command - [color=#a4885c]Armory Policy[/color]: Await orders from Central Command Personnel. - [color=#a4885c]Discipline[/color]: Await orders from Central Command Personnel. - [color=#a4885c]Secure Areas[/color]: Await orders from Central Command Personnel. - [color=#a4885c]Medical[/color]: Full suit sensors mandatory for observation and safety. Await orders from Central Command Personnel. - [color=#a4885c]Engineering[/color]: Await orders from Central Command Personnel. - [color=#a4885c]ROE[/color]: Martial Law is in effect. Do not engage with Central Command Personnel. Await orders from Central Command Personnel.
